Moving forward, at around noon I’ve gave them a call and spoke to a very polite gentleman name Jonathan and explained to him about my situation, and  to my surprise Jonathan and his brother Daryl came to my rescue on such a short notice and on a “Sunday” too! This gets even better! Ironically, this day we experienced a winter storm which was very windy and they worked through it. On the next day as they are finishing up on the job I’ve noticed my hot water tank isn’t working, so I’ve asked Jonathan if it was ok for him to help me to take a look at it.  Of course he did without any hesitations. The problem with my hot water tank was that due to the storm it created a water leak from the roof and must have  put out the pilot light. I was very luck to have Jonathan and Daryl there at that same time as they fixed the leak without any extra charge! Who does this now?  Please support A1 roofing, they are not only polite, professional but they actually care about their clients. [{"Name":"Saskia Wells","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxEQmN2hLepZZSgzKOWKnvxdDmZbbyWTLCFgouYauOt8Wxnw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give zero stars, I would.
JDM replaced our roof approximately two years ago, and it is already leaking. A roof should not fail this quickly,regardless of any warranty.
Although they claim to offer a 10-year warranty, we did not trust them to repair the damage because:
1.	A roof should never be leaking after 2–3 years, and
2.	We previously asked them to fix other issues, which were never properly addressed.

The leaks have been occurring for some time and resulted in mouldy insulation that had to be fully replaced. Another roofing company inspected the attic and documented multiple serious issues, including:
•	Incorrectly installed flashing causing leaks
•	An extractor vent they installed that caused cold drafts
•	Mould on the attic walls
•	Additional installation problems that should never have passed inspection

I contacted the owner directly and provided photo evidence. He refused to take responsibility and then stopped responding entirely. The bare minimum would have been a reply.
Based on how the owner has responded to other negative reviews, I expect he may try to deflect blame here as well, but the facts remain:
A roof should not leak after only a couple of years.
We are now paying out of pocket to fix problems that should never have existed in the first place.
Do not hire this company.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve McCartney","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSqhIrSnUZ25U2qdrVY-Dt-FYhwnF7LpCQAW_KJKEsy-CDEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"During the most recent atmospheric river, our cabin's roof started to leak. I called several places but didn't get a response. I called JDM and spoke to Jim. Jim was polite and professional and assured us that in spite of the significant challenges presented to his workers (due to closed highways and flooding), they would get a man to look at our roof. This was done right on time and the problem was fixed. The next day part 2 of the atmospheric river started and our roof was leak free. We had a great experience with JDM and full heartedly endorse JDM as a company that is trustworthy and professional.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kelly Obermayer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUnxOIq54fInOxvpJF_bpcKCakRcXrb97q8WLiP-AQjeW713Ok=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you, Jim. They provided great workmanship on the  installation of the shingles, even staying late to get the job done. The quality of the product is one of the best. We are so happy with the finished product. Again, thank you for everything.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDb2JzIOg&fid=0x0:0xf67edbecabe344db"],"When":"2024-8-1"},{"Name":"Steve Phillips","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKgUCFdjeDcuoyjjxDwpgGiK_ox9UQ_9MPHJAM0g6c1n_knQQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a small leak from a 30 year old skylight. Five stars and two thumbs up!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Clint Hames","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2gjC2QXy-9uPTqgDceiMJw2Mfg53FPGxg1TNamWlPWbP_Ew=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Completely happy with the quality, speed and cost of our new roof. Jim was friendly and always prompt at returning phone calls and getting the roof installed in a timely manner 5/5!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Terry Touchette","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWKNsTPY42NQxYGeHp6Flasuv_6WU-3v6_LEIo23xJc0fV6VxE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Called for an estimate, Jim came out waked around the house, answered a couple questions I had, said he would be back in a few days with the estimate.  Week later, I messaged him for an update on the quote,  messaged back he would be there tomorrow morning.  No show again wasted my time waiting around.  If you don’t want the job just say so.

Reply to your reply.
You came on a Saturday, said in your message you would get me the estimate by Wednesday, when you left you said you would have it to me on Thursday.  Nothing from you for over week.  I messaged you Monday night looking for an update. You replied, it’s done I will drop it off in the morning.  I waited around all morning, changing my schedule around.  You didn’t show up, no messages, no communication at all. I then wrote the review.  I then went on with my day.  Came home to an envelope on my door step. So yes I guess you did get me my estimate thanks.  Guess you saw the negative review and then dropped it off.

As for roofer time.
The other company I got a quote from. Set a time for the inspection. Showed up when they said they would. Actually inspected the roof and my attic spaces. Then set up a time for the estimate.  Showed up on time for the estimate and provided it to me in a professional manner.

You may do good work I will never personally known, but you get the one star for lack of communication.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lee & Caroline Marshall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI9Wui-AoKXWRY0ZHEpLKY2V9VnQMTKal-4noxVBjrCPaplXg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We would like to thank JDM for their exceptional work on replacing our roof and putting a new roof on our extension. It is without hesitation that we would recommend them to anyone needing their services. Thank you so much everyone for your work and making what could have been a stressful situation so easy. Your crew are amazing. We really appreciated how they cleaned the site after the job was completed.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We purchased five interior doors, six bifold doors, and all the necessary hardware from them. Tyler, who assisted us with our order, was fantastic—he made sure everything was ordered promptly and gave us a call as soon as our items arrived for pick up.

⏲ A few months after installation (by our contractor), we noticed that one of the doors (with the mickey) had bowed. Pioneer Building Supplies handled the situation with exceptional customer service. They sent one of their trusted contractors to our home with a replacement door and installed it at no charge. The replacement fits perfectly, as shown in the second picture.

❤ We also bought our hardware from them, which was hard to find due to the specific finish I wanted, but Pioneer had it in stock! As a fun project, I even turned one of the bifold doors in our kitchen into a swing door—a clever idea I found on TikTok.

📌I highly recommend Pioneer Building Supplies without hesitation. Their combination of quality products, excellent customer service, and decades of experience makes them a top choice for anyone looking to upgrade their home.

We plan to have them install a new front door this fall. 🍂

📌 I will have reviews for contractors/businesses we use for flooring, house painting, plumbing, gutters, doors and more in the Abby area. 📷 A picture speaks a thousand words.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICH1MPYBQ&fid=0x0:0xf14552ec2afe03a4"],"When":"2024-9-1"},{"Name":"Doris R","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJaRmxIADaLNAv0JRZoLQd37CmlJ_TskSdQyBK9PmzbQn-_yg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had the immense pleasure of working with Paul in the flooring department for the recent renovation of our basement.  From first contact, providing quotes, booking installation, progress updates, and billing,  every step was seamless. Communication and follow up was quick. One very minor issue was handled promptly and professionally.  Would definitely recommend  Pioneer Buildall.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDf6ciq1QE&fid=0x0:0xf14552ec2afe03a4"],"When":"2025-1-8"},{"Name":"maryam Rahnama","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIascLndN_ZfJa9vvzJSvwbN6aCHI-anHbnozNNfts28BrTAQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place to purchase tools, concrete blocks, and many more. Excellent customer service.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Richard W.","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVlZDR84KriHJyTSPZoZMwc7lICkw2XLMrViiCHBGDmbNQ-eu-TkQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Had my floors done and the installers were very quick to get in and out. I was pressed to move furniture out of bedroom early one morning and did so, and at 4 that night the installer said he wasn't coming back till Monday..it was Thursday and he only laid 2 pieces of floor into bedroom. When he started the flooring with not that great English he tried to explain his pattern ..
And I thought that was for a very random pattern he was going to lay down.and to not see a pattern of starting with a partial plank every so many laid..
What I feel I got was no consideration to what I feel should be standard practise. With laminants there are patterns and textures that I feel should be distributed throughout the floor and cammouflage  the perception of that unique identifiable pattern. I was not impressed when they raced out ..
I looked down at the floor to examine..also the start to many rows of flooring he has a small 1 inch or 2inch piece...now I feel that this is not common practice...hoping that I am right..?
And the first area I looked down was the hallway in front of bedroom. And blatantly staring at me were 2 patterns in the floor that were repeated in a very narrow part..making them glare at me even more because of the small area they were laid in.
As he did closets my sliding  doors were a little snug but as he did them he told me that I would have to fix that..
Now they are quote snug and i struggle with them. Areas outside where he was cutting he did a small touch with broom but left a new cedar cover sprayed thick with sawdust..there were more issues...I did call and made payment...and as I verified the amount there was a charge for 150 more for moving furniture...! I went a little ballistic when I heard that considering a bed he helped me slide out of the 1 bedroom and the frame...
When he arrived and was setting up I had a fellow helping me with projects and every time the 2 of us came into the  house we packed a box of flooring. And every time we exited we removed a load of the floor he took out...saving him major steps that there was no consideration given to with this charge. At the end I explained all this to a fellow from the store who was super helpful and scheduled everything quickly, after I paid to show him that my complaints were not there to reduce payment to them... except for the $150.
I was disappointed that he called me back and all that was said was he wanted the $150; to disappear...and didn't even acknowledge the other areas of concern I had...the thresholds going Into rooms were not properly fixed and were loose after the weight was pulled of them a day later...and I will figure out how to fix and will not call back. I am sure that this is only one incident and there are many very happy customers and maybe I got an installer who had a bad day...?","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICEir-NUg&fid=0x0:0xf14552ec2afe03a4"],"When":"2017-12-15"},{"Name":"Dale Johnnie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKA8UKTryWr787NryHSiLr8OoZ7-fbUvjirgiQ9a4MonnWw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Quick service. Helpful staff. Helped us load stuff in truck.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Steve Head","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLkk--ufcGktpYchDViVwKQu-NtODWi29xlz7s19ydaJowlBg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Outstanding service. We had flooring installed, nothing was too much trouble, price was extremely competitive, excellent value. Couple of faults had to be remedied, this was done without question. Our first place to call next time we need flooring. Shana the sales rep was great, as was Jessie the installer. Great attention to detail.","Images":null,"When":""}]

We are extremely pleased with the quality of their work and highly recommend them.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBns80_9AOxV4S9s_XQnd5e&fid=0x0:0xf3ca6780221a12a0"],"When":"2025-9-17"},{"Name":"Kriss Brown-Wall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVJBDq8iPh7bNobIISJqx_EuByHTrC7BSmonuN-rrJDMyPZY4vb2w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I have used Master Painter's two times now. We had Philip and Andre come to repair several areas with our textured ceiling.  It all blends in perfectly.  They went over and beyond to protect the floors/furniture.  No dust and no mess to clean up. Highly recommend. Thank you Master Painting & Renovations.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Garrett MacAskill","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLajy2od6UNK6wFpIW0R0KJNKzbyXG3DPnEVuFJcGNujiEj4g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Master Painting team did a great job of installing and painting trim work in my home.  Great attention to detail, excellent results and also a friendly crew of guys.  Much impressed!  Thanks again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Carson Wilson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXObyvrvhpAVhGo99UrkOxgNEvn8eg-TqKoDDAKVjLeo5YSjVVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The first, most important thing I can say is it is safe to hire these folks. Your money, project and time are all in good hands with them. We were very anxious because , after top end appliances and so forth, this was a $150,000+ project for us. We had no real experience with renovations, and already got hosed by questionable landscapers for tens of thousands, an experience we did not want to repeat.
Dave and his crew were incredible patient with us. We had so many questions, changed our minds / revised the plan multiple times including a significant about face on the newly installed kitchen tile resulting in all of taking down (entirely our decision).
They worked very closely with us throughout the entire process, they did everything they said they would on time and on budget. The quality of their work was top notch.
What was really cool is even their sub-contracted trades were amazing. Great personalities, hard workers. Master must have enough work and contacts that they were able to get trades to work around our schedule when needed, or move fast when it was necessary.
I just cannot thank them enough, they were professional, kind, and honestly just fun to work with. These were the kind of people you want to be friends with.
We just about completely rebuilt the entire kitchen, keeping the wall cabinets but fully rebuilding the island for scratch, and rebuilding an entire appliance bay. Our install was complex because we plumbed in not one, but two steam ovens which required some tricky plubming and a ton of electrical. It went off without a hitch. In fact, when Miele came to inspect it (a requirement they have for the install), they said it's about the best they've seen an multi-million dollar homes didn't even compare to the quality of work, and adherence to the appliance requirements as well as Master and their contractors did.
We also did a lot of electric work in the garage, upgrading the panel, adding a second EV charger, and upgrading the first.
The entire storage room, which is massive in our home and divided into three spaces, was completely redone and affectionately referr to as, "The Bunker". Finally, we tore down the fireplace completely, and had it rebuilt with a beautiful three sided glass fireplace, huge tiling, and a rotating framed art tv. Those are the highlights and the pictures 100% do not do it justice. I wish I had more spaces and more money so I'd have the opportunity to work with them again.
Feel secure in hiring these folks, the risk factor is zero.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDrpNLHmgE&fid=0x0:0xf3ca6780221a12a0"],"When":"2024-7-15"},{"Name":"reviewer04","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXOA4vYn2bAoq9tPyD3FZjd5f2HkQMnTSUFugKyeH0zrqPPHjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"My family hired Master Painting to remove the popcorn ceilings and repaint them in a small 450 sq ft area. Unfortunately, our experience was not what we expected for the price we paid.

There has since been bubbling across the bedrooms, hallway, and bathroom. Some areas have also started peeling, suggesting the surface wasn’t adequately prepared.

The bathroom paint used was not moisture-appropriate, and we noticed mold developing afterward. The company did return to address this, but the outcome still wasn’t satisfactory.

The project took longer than expected to complete.

Because of these issues, we will need to correct the work. Based on our experience, we recommend that potential customers ask detailed questions and potentially consider other options.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Eva Goldthorp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-mUJ5_i652LM7qxH-wIvjNbR43T8jn6EWPaNNjZbI93ztQYY=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was very impressed with the work of Master Painting & Renovation. They were quick to get me a quote, very responsive to emails, and super super clean. I’m a DIY-er, but hate drywall projects that leave my house covered in dust and have me tracking it everywhere. I decided to outsource changing a swinging door into a pocket door and I’m SO glad I did! They put up a curtain and my whole house stayed spotless for the duration of the project. Highly recommend!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICb06LfpAE&fid=0x0:0xf3ca6780221a12a0"],"When":"2024-7-29"}]

Side note the windows going into the hose down the street look fantastic, would prefer of the driver didn’t turn the heavy truck around in my driveway when there is other options.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sheila Demare","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLFzjIn1iyRR78TUwYJvUys2NvRQDUrKJ0EYyVPv_XLS6ho0g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Our previous tenants broke two of the locking mechanisms on our Westeck Windows. During the move-out inspection, I discovered the issue but had no clue how to repair it or who to call. I also was short on time, because I have new tenants coming in 4 days, and wanted the job done while the suite was empty, if possible. I called Westeck, and spoke to Dave. I told Dave what I thought was the issue, and he committed to getting the job done in the short time frame I had. I got a phone call from Dave minutes after our first conversation. He had arranged for a technician to come the same day (today), and he asked me to send him photos so that the technician could come prepared to do the work with the parts needed for the job. The technician arrived and was courteous, capable, and quick. He diagnosed the issue and replaced hardware, and reset the first window, and replaced hardware on the second. [{"Name":"Agatha Kerkhoff","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWzROfILgIgfxUZTiUvkjMDBXeX_DABPfNlAaPNFodxkzfAvYxY=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We hired Mike from PCS Construction to remediate mold in our home and, although very expensive (thousands of dollars); the service did nothing to resolve our issue.

We made the mistake of trusting his assessment and believed the problem had been handled.

About a year later, we continued experiencing health issues, which led us to consult an ACTUAL certified remediation specialist.

This team arrived with PROPER equipment, conducted thorough testing, and identified an active issue inside a wall, including a previously undetected leak. Their findings made it clear that the original remediation was INCOMPLETE and INEFFECTIVE.

Based on this experience, we do not consider this business a reliable or reputable source for mold remediation and would not recommend their services to anyone experiencing health issues because of mold exposure.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chelsie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVND1zMcmqjFsp6_AZUp_urjd8dk-icrR7fjGgCIl4NpvPsDqwzAA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mike and Roberta went above and beyond to help me. Micheal came in, asked for our take on the situation, took a look around and was quickly able to tell us that our place is most likely what is making our son sick. He told us we need to move asap and told us he would provide us with the documents necessary to give to our landlord.

Thank you so much Michael!! We appreciate you more than you know!! We would give more than 5 stars if we could!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Chanelle D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCEGtGi_rnAXcez2UGfi8tPvkrtnC3uoCyaDz_NpX-tJAfWp2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My 1930s bungalow had asbestos in the attic and i had no idea how dangerous it is to your health. Michael took the time to educate me on asbestos and when he gave me a quote, he helped me to understand the costs. He helped me to stay under budget as removal is not cheap and the work is highly regulated so very few companies have the certification to do it. Michael and team went above and beyond.. he had his staff pick up keys from me when i couldn't make it out and when it came time for the air monitoring, he helped me to resolve an overbilling issue from the 3rd party company. He walked me through the process on site and showed me the set up. They took pictures and sent me the progress of the work and they went above and beyond to clean up every inch of asbestos found between crevices. I really appreciated the friendly, trustworthy nature of the staff and  the depth of knowledge Michael had when it comes to old houses and abatement work involved. PCS was the best priced, very knowledgeable and was willing to work with your budget. Thank you.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gregory Kenny","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLbFjAgRRsLsvO55JQ6I-pvCfPik9LyG65QHGNp3DPs6HVabQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had Mike and the PCS team complete two projects for us.

The work was carried out in a professional  manner which either met or exceeded regulatory requirements and the completed work sites were left in a state where all building surfaces were literally spotless.

Thank you for your professionalism and excellence PCS!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"K F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLfoONtpyIzxPPWjQGPtzzjvgD3futSarH7ZpG9GA6HPZ4F7Q=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent company to work with. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Ashley Zhou","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJjIMG7GGtgMrGKnoMRyPocdJErBTJLs0_A1is2YXOVsjqb_w=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't recommend Bulletproof Roof Systems Ltd enough. Marty and his guys are nothing but professional. here's the list of reasons why I recommend them:
1. reasonable pricing: I searched on Google and BBB, and contacted 4 roofing companies (including Marty's) based on the rating and reviews to come check out my roof and give me a quote. Marty's pricing was very close to one of the companies, the other two were just straight-up gaugers, 1 didn't give a price and the other quoted us for almost double the money.
2. professionalism & integrity: My husband is in trades, so he has a good read on contractors. Marty stood out immediately due to his professionalism. He came prepared with a thick file of information. He patiently walked us through all the roof materials. Since we decided on shingles to start with, he narrowed it down and went into details on those. Gave us his honest opinions and never tried to oversell us on fancy options.
3. his amazing crew: Marty pretty much organized everything, cleaning, garbage bin, and porta potty. Our project was scheduled 3 months ahead, and unfortunately, when it was supposed to happen, we got rain started that week. we all worried to guts on the quality and the safety. I believe I messaged Marty 3 times due to this rain. He was patient and assured me they wouldn't work in the rain and they would ensure everything was covered and the quality of the work. I gotta say, just trust the process. They are professional, my roof was done beautifully with no leaks. His crew cleaned up the site at the end of the project, it was such a peace of mind.

TL;DR, HIRE MARTY FOR YOUR ROOF. I did a ton of research prior to hiring Marty and went through the process with his team. Just knowing his team is working on my roof, fixing fascia boards,  skylights, and chimney is complete peace of mind. I did not need to do anything or worry at all.

Finally, I referred Marty to my neighbor, who also contacted a few roofers prior and they immediately decided to go with Marty after meeting him.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDzoMCsMQ&fid=0x0:0xca21b1ded6b1e2af"],"When":"2024-6-6"},{"Name":"Diana Bernier","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKHC6s5uJ7X5mSqPd3IfDvWb_WTAI0R5WcvnvDYjlg7wgfGM6fYg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Marty and his team did a wonderful job with our roof. [{"Name":"Daniel Hofer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ0lTMq1ZIAEhOyOIDbJ_KTe3P4A8Rsm7hmQi73ufLpfHmi9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Last week we had yet another heavy rainfall as is becoming quite a regular thing. My good friend called me up on a Tuesday night very emotional and upset that her roof had stung yet another leak. The following morning at 8am I called Taves roofing. Within less than 10 minutes, technician Tim called me back. I gave him some background information on my friend’s situation. He arranged to meet me that same day at her home at 11am for an assessment. Tim came out, checked the damage, gave a quote, then went straight to work on tarping the damaged areas. I figured he would look at it, give a quote, then return days later. I was very surprised and very grateful that he was able to complete the task immediately. After finishing the job, he offered up an amazing price below the already great quoted price. He said Taves was a family run company, and when Mr Taves heard the story of my friend’s situation, he felt compassion and wanted to help her out as best as he could. I was blown away! Not only was their response time and service impeccable, but, to reach out in a show of support to a fellow community member was over the top amazing. I would highly recommend Taves for any roofing dilemma you may be faced with. Thank you Tim and thank you to the Taves family.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angus Morrrison","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUcYMnJ2UDE_NWaMiUS9e5C9MspQNsqZsIGQZwjrQxaa5G15CLV=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After the first good rainfall I found a leak in one of my roof vents. Taves was recommended from a hard working honest roofer who my mom used for years. After calling Taves I received a call back within the hour. Tim was able to make it on site an hour after our phone call. He was honest, punctual and easy to deal with. He assessed my roof, and only repaired what required it. I was very pleased with the service I received from Taves Roofing. I would recommend them to anyone, and will be using them in the future.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"S Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKQJSp3ZLKJtUmfTdQrNzyoYHyIh6HgJ04ovIYHcc4T-3bNJw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My metal roof was leaking. As fairly new rv owners, this kind of customer service is exactly what we need.

We really appreciate your kindness today Kevin!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kaitlyn Newman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKduiUaALlW0C-AGeQ3DnJ84n7QYTazDLlYxSJRbfm0kucGjA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Adventure RV repair is a very busy shop and after my interaction with them I can see why. I also happened to have my trailer fully set up so taking it somewhere would have been largely inconvient. At best I was hoping to find a place that would do the insurance quote on location some time in the next 1-2 weeks and I'd just weather the damage while waiting for the claim to be approved. Our yucky bat infested falling apart red tin roof is finally replaced by a best in buisness quality guaranteed to last product .","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDu_dKeyQE&fid=0x0:0xe18066a3a65ab1d5"],"When":"2022-8-27"},{"Name":"Ron and Anjie","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXZtCMMmwftrUcdFL73CVajfIe7PjwTZWNgI5sdFjLR-SWHW-TD=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Beware! Please do not waste your money with this company. You will have to redo your roof as we are now. Jent Construction renovated and added an addition to our home in 2010. They hired H&I to roof it. We began having problems after two years. Now after 14 years we have to replace our entire 35 year roof at a cost of $25,000. They used untrained, unskilled workers. They had a crew of 20 people and completed our entire huge roof in one day. I have had several companies, including H&I, give me estimates. They have all concluded the roof was not adequately ventilated. The roofing was not placed properly as the joints are to close together. Some of the shingles are overlapping. Thank you thank you thank you!! Action Roofing you guys are amazing!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob Huffer","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUNcS0xtASdkcg0JscxywSfJUDStKw-AgcOtjC_oL3toNzmLV4=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"As an anxious individual discovering a leak in the ceiling of our master bathroom, I did a little research and called Action Roofing Ltd for someone to come out to have a look. David was very friendly and because they were working a job in the area he sent someone the next day at lunchtime.  After inspecting both the attic and rooftop by two inspectors I received an estimate including pictures and a full description of what was required… seven of nine vents required replacing, cracking due to weather conditions over the fourteen years we’ve been in our new home. The inspectors were very friendly and professional as was David when I told him I was wanting to get a second estimate. David understood, respectfully agreeing I should do so without hesitation. The next day I called him back and thankfully he told me they would watch the weather and get on it asap.  A couple of days later all nine vents were replaced and the entire roof was recapped along with examining the rest of the roof for any other issues which were touched up. Again, everyone was friendly, polite and professional. Cleanup afterwards was spotless. I’m very thankful and relieved with how they handled everything including my anxiety. I told them I would be happy to give a referral but only after the weather once again got bad as a final test and again, David understood and totally agreed. I don’t usually give five stars because I believe there’s always room for achievement but these people couldn’t get much closer. Thank you Action Roofing!  Bob","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Juliet Kerr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUdwQEg8d_MO1Tt-h_CjcS6-9JvoLheq1Rt0GBzyLBdp8SnzPK7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For something as daunting as replacing the roof of your home, Dave and his team made this process seamless from start to finish! There were no unexpected issues or surprises regarding invoicing or the placement of the new roof. The team was so efficient and left my house with a brand new beautiful roof and new fascia boards and no mess or issues.

I would absolutely recommend Action Roofing Ltd to anyone needing to replace their existing roof.

We’ve gotten so many great deals here.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jennifer Stolle","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXHw8ZuTh9qWPkG7CSLVVE4-wxQbZni635Mn8GpEcv7V5eqRag8=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great place with some great finds. Good place to check often for selection. We bought a great desk here; plus I got some great clothes.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jay Jay","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLviqT-oMksASSm42l9Bme6slrt4DhYvdmc6LJ4fFG4jaFCyhg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Overpriced!

I recently visited the ReStore branch in Chilliwack and noticed a Ridgid power tool that initially seemed reasonably priced. However, when I returned the next day during their end-of-month sale, I was surprised that the price had increased significantly, from $20 to $60 or a 200% "jack-up". This change caught my attention, and I began to question the pricing strategy of this branch.

As someone familiar with Ridgid tools, I know that purchasing from authorized retailers like Home Depot provides a lifetime warranty (aka Lifetime Service Agreement or LSA) if registered within 90 days. The latest model at Home Depot is priced at $98 during the sale, which includes this lifetime warranty. While the $60 price at ReStore might deter those aware of the warranty benefits, it could still be a good option for those looking for a quick purchase without comparing prices elsewhere.

The branch should consider more transparent pricing practices and recheck its business ethics. Despite this experience, I think they may still offer a few good deals for customers who don’t have the time to shop around or not familiar with the products in ReStore. I would encourage others to visit and make their assessments.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCQoPy-twE&fid=0x0:0x4b36a23f3580b60d"],"When":"2025-3-1"},{"Name":"Nanda & Marco","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUKOxNWk49eJ3XvUE8s5Cmi2fZXTajpxNYGia5knobexg2bA8A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Tons of selection new and used! I was pushing a cart to pick up a bag of mortar and it was very difficult to get into the building area, out of the building area and then out to my car.
Why are there no automatic doors or accessible buttons? I struggled, but I would imagine anyone with mobility issues would have even more difficulty.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhCX85KjLbp0bKH-FHNI5pT6&fid=0x0:0xe6192a77fe193f18"],"When":"2025-8-10"},{"Name":"M M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJa9vDnaoeb1hN5olKDsvRS2F9oy7U9iyv2d4kJ1kKAxyF-dw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"First time at this rona and can honestly say this store has excellent employees, i went in to purchase a makita combo kit unfortunately they did not have it in stock and would have to be ordered, i was  helped by an employee named LEE. owner: {"id":"109405321522552624182","name":"NCR Contracting - Renos, Decks, Framing, Demolition \u0026 Excavations (Owner)","link":"https://www.google.com/maps/contrib/109405321522552624182"}
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Chanelle D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXCEGtGi_rnAXcez2UGfi8tPvkrtnC3uoCyaDz_NpX-tJAfWp2A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was pleased to have had the opportunity to work with Nik on this project. He came in asking a lot of detailed questions to understand my vision. He provided options and sent the quote to me in a proper letterhead right away unlike many contractors who just send you a text message. He was professional from the start. He started on my project early, showed up on time all the time, communicated to me at every step to show me his progress and what his next tasks are, he responds to all my questions immediately and tells me what his plan is for the next day. He delivered on what he promised - the beautiful arch, the cedar sidings, drywall throughout. We went a bit over scope (I asked for some extras) but he still executed on the project without a budget overrun because he wanted me to be happy with the results. I did not expect the porch to look as adorable as it turned out. He managed to maintain the original character of the house despite having to remove some unique elements like arches. He modified some of the pieces (ie. railing) and went above and beyond with some of the features (ie. stairs, door trims, inside arch walkthrough), insulating the porch well, and puttying the drywall over 4 days. When he got some help from a colleague of his, he came in to check on the progress and inspected the work. He was also flexible in working around other trades (ie. electrician). He always showed up on time and he honored the project budget and scope. I would recommend him for future project. He is very easy to work with, flexible, professional, communicative and super reliable.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBtQUSE0dYBJCJf0Mw-u2m_&fid=0x0:0x9941a8556ef3286c"],"When":"2025-11-6"},{"Name":"Nora Kruse","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVFaz5wVfXhawuyOG0hN9K9R9kbJFZmTrZKsh7Jn4ZGjyHVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I've had problems with the overflow of water from the gutters of my house despite having had one or two companies do gutter cleaning,  I contacted Nick and found that he answers texts/emails in a timely fashion.  He detected that the seams needed repair  and gave me a date when he could do them.  He arrived on time, spent quite a time doing the repair and after a week he turned up to inspect his work after quite a heavy rain.  He was pleased with his work but thought a part of the gutter needed cleaning, which he said he would do at no charge.  I'm pleased and happy to report he came back, did the cleaning and I couldn't be happier with his integrity and customer service!  I definitely would recommend him and his company.
Sincerely,   Nora Kruse","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLA2t5F9sdqk7oZoq7nf2oFf6aVAvzaBf9AXKst_QxaZSoYfg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ive hired Nick for a number of projects and recommend him to quite a few people. Not only did they take very good care of all of our furniture, making sure it was packed away securely;  they were also incredibly efficient. Every single one of them were beyond friendly and helpful. They even took our bed frame and couch apart for us and put them back together.

They were happy to help with all the things! We appreciate you so much! Thanks again.

We would recommend them to all!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aleksandra Adam","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWQcd5veukwycPwi-5KHw9k1u9CKGdPchdp7webFvR2k2QWefGoPA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"I booked them to move me in on January 15 at 10 AM. The 15th came around 10 AM came around nobody showed up. I called numerous times. Nobody answered I sent text message. Nobody replied. I finally got a call back at about 130 saying I told them 25 January not the 15th and now everybody was dispatched doing jobs and they wouldn’t be able to make it until 330 which was not an option for me due to timing and having to be out of the old place all I got was an apology that we don’t normally do this. We’re so sorry there was no offer to pay my moving expenses. There was no offer to do anything other than they can come at 3:30 and thought it was Miss booked and it was booked for the 25th and I am a single mother with three kids. Didn’t have any help moving as I had hired movers for a reason this company is completely unprofessional and left me totally stranded the day of my move. There was no follow up the next day of trying to make this right or an amends or anything so disappointed because I booked them based on their reviews.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matt Wright","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX40SN7WWNKDfoQMElxvdBdhtNgYckINqODnAQ3fuBNPRVDq9w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Replay Movers went far beyond what I expected—especially for the price. Jazz and his team provided a full-service move: packing, blanket-wrapping all furniture, protecting my couch, and loading a 26-foot u-haul truck so efficiently that my entire three-bedroom house fit into one truck.

Communication was excellent with timely updates, and they arrived fully equipped with dollies and supplies. When I asked if wrapping costs extra, I was told it was included, which genuinely surprised me.

Other movers were 50–60% more expensive, yet Replay Movers delivered incredible value and service. Highly recommended!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"narayana kandukuri","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJdK4h5nxKqNSJrZpVjY-3b4hfaBia76ELdgBzEMlywH78QHw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"They are more than amazing!! Just get their service, they will help you in all their capacity. Very professional, communication is great and friendly to support any complex moving needs . They have a truck and do full move services. Amazing energy levels and very creative in arranging the items in trailer. They are smart to know how to get things done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tina Barton","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL4A9PuupdJL8zCAnQsw4AFF3ELpWMZrY4mAn-DehvQlDPhfA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"For our move, Jas and team were punctual, helpful and finished exactly on time. They offered one of the most affordable rates - good value for money. They brought moving blankets and tools, and also put together a double bunk bed for us. I would hire them again.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Gabrielle Valk","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVTJt0r392TwWk1E7r-irgAmcLDp_PQtEUTshvWVfuLsq3Yq7cq=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"If I could give 10 stars, I would.
Replay Movers absolutely saved my entire moving day — and honestly, probably my sanity too.

These guys showed up last minute at 4:30 PM, after already working a full day from 7 AM, and still walked in with positive attitudes, big smiles, and the kind of energy you only get from people who actually take pride in their work.

I had a full 3-bedroom, two-load move, and these two didn’t stop.
I mean literally — they took maybe two 2-minute water breaks and went straight back to work. No phones, no slacking, no long “breaks disguised as breaks.” Just pure grind and exceptional work ethic.

They were:
•	Extremely careful with all my belongings
•	Fast, organized, and great communicators
•	Respectful, kind, and professional
•	Affordable (honestly shockingly so)
•	And somehow still upbeat even when we wrapped just after 11 PM

And the cherry on top?
They had extra room in the truck and offered to take my dump items free of charge — saving me another trip and another headache. I could’ve cried from relief.

Replay doesn’t just do moving.
They also handle dump runs, furniture pickup/drop-off, TV mounting, small jobs, big jobs — you name it.
And after seeing how they worked, I would trust them with ANYTHING.

I will never use another moving company again.
These guys made an impossible day possible — with heart, hustle, and professionalism you don’t see often.

If you’re moving, just book them.
You’ll be grateful you did.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Chris P","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIkuJN2EJSu4n0SWHSoGAMna1aCpZtYrUusryKHhrmkw_U9yw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Negative 0 stars
Terrible customer service and poor work. The office is great and the fan installation people are excellent but I warn people to stay away from the building side of things. They subcontract all their work and it is subpar to say the least.
Because it is a strata complex they will also not relay any information on repairing the unit that you own. The excuse is the strata is the client so I do not deserve any information on our home that we own.
Matt Derish is the project manager for this and he will not relay any information regarding repairs, timelines or completion. If that is the kind of service you would like by all means go with Winmar and Matt Derish but this is my experience.
Our home has been without an entire bedroom (rotten exterior wall) since November of 2022 and it is now September of 2023. Here is some picture of the 15’x8’ wall and pictures of the work when I get home for proof of the workmanship that they have subcontracted out.
There is no excuses for this kind of service and actions that they still have not completed.
This is the work and dangerous work area that Matt Derish from Winmar Restoration is responsible for and has been left like this for nearly a year.
They have raised the foundation on top of a cracked foundation that still has water ingress from above below and exterior siding. The foundation that they did raise has concrete patches all over it. (Our 10 year old child could do a better job at patching)  however it should not be patched in the first place if the job was done right. The interior foundation wall that they poured is bulging out and protrudes past the drywall which will be a problem if it ever gets to that stage. The foundation leaks between the new wall and the foundation. They still have not removed a portion of the foundation that has blown out and spilled concrete on our floor. The raised foundation is not straight plumb or level. We have had three emergency water ingress call-out issues so far since  Winmar was contracted to do the repairs. (Very expensive) and not necessary if the repairs were done properly effectively or in a time sensitive manner. They simply blame strata for everything and yes strata is partly to blame for timing however strata is not responsible for Matt’s actions or the work he is responsible for. He regularly will not answer phone calls, text messages and he even proceeded to tell our manager for me to refrain from messaging him after hours even though he is responsible for the issues.  Like water pouring in our house on our electrical wires (that are taped) which is wrong or our animals and neighbours animals coming and going in our home. I did that twice only and there was VERY Good reasoning for this. They are are animals and our house was leaking because of his work. Also the scaffolding three stories high nearly blew over off the building into our parking lot and or cars/people. We were away for the long weekend and we had our cats escape out of the house and another cat entered our home while we were out of town on holidays. That is how secure there Jobsites are if a cat can enter or exit there is nothing stopping anything else such as rodents or criminals.

Stay away from this type of company and Matt Derish at all costs.Matt Derish has a terrible “better than you” attitude and is very arrogant to put it lightly. If you have had the pleasure of dealing with him I am sure you have noticed his attitude and actions.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDptL3hIg&fid=0x0:0xc7220ecc8ecb1088"],"When":"2023-8-17"},{"Name":"candis sexsmith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX9SZ9b0Kj0Bl0oH8hoC0SLxDSbHXMTgLNefR2EIRdzXuv0FTk=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Poor customer skills and very poor workmanship, Matt Derish is the project manager and he will not talk to the homeowner and frequently ignores messages and phone calls.
Stay away from This buisiness they subcontract all their work and it is subpar to say the least.
If you are a strata owner he will not speak to you and says we are not the client so he will not provide any updates, timelines, or expectations. He never returns calls and has a “ I’m better than you attitude”. Stay away from the construction side of things and Winmar.
Office and fan installation people are wonderful but that’s it.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Raymond Belair","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXlSxSUljVth2sa6BzmXvitkHl9uZchO-lArEw53LaGmrWT7wOTmg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Today, Ryan Anderson of Winmar completed a water damage project in my condo apartment. The work done below the initial cost estimate, everything was completed ahead of schedule, and my unit is in better shape than when I moved in. The staff were friendly, yet professional and Ryan kept me appraised during every stepthroughout the process. If anyone needs restoration work done to their home, contact Ryan Anderson. You will be treated fairly and happy with the results. Bravo!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Marie Ehman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKDhSwImL74YxHNq5rApQfUiixbxECVwVAUBAs7b14bXR8L8A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Matt and WINMAR were great to deal with when we had an insurance claim related to water damage.  They made a difficult situation much easier than it could have been.  All the trades people involved were professional and we felt at ease having them in our home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Suzanne Bartel","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVB6z2JqNCqcAY-vt74UrQ13sucyKc7QRAXTRMp2D0LpKDQVLrk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"This is the second time we’ve used Winmar! This time, with a major sewage mess in our crawl space that was stinking up our whole house, they arrived promptly with in hours of contacting them on the Friday night of a long weekend.  They were polite and cheerful about their job (a very nasty job!!!), telling us to go relax while they took care of it. What a relief for us to have such a confident team taking care of our horrendous mess!! Thank you so much!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Erika Svendsen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ4pVfS804HUtjcDdsE2Lw5zmHtaYLv7nVPmPXljVn-AI5UWg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Absolutely horrible service.  We had a claim for windstorm damage in November, 2015.  It is now May and it still has not been repaired.  The shingles on our home are flapping in the wind, we still have a broken window.  They have done some work and just left the rest.  Darren Miller was our rep and he has consistently lied and refused to return my phone calls.  After six months of this nightmare, we have been in contact with our insurance adjuster and he has had no luck with Winmar... in fact Darren explained to him that he did not know the roof was damaged.
